reason: Implementation is complete, correct, and production-ready. SubjectRef and WorkflowArtifact are well-designed generic types with proper serde support, idiomatic builder patterns, and full bidirectional compatibility adapters. All tests pass. Only a minor style inconsistency (WorkflowArtifact lacks PartialEq derive where SubjectRef has it) but this is non-blocking since Value does not impl Eq and PartialEq is not required by any current consumer.

evidence.description: All 10 new unit tests in subject_ref_tests pass. Full protocol crate test suite (16 tests across unit and integration modules) passes with no failures.
Bidirectional From impls between SubjectRef and WorkflowSubject are correct; Custom variant round-trip preserves title and description without data loss.
WorkflowArtifact builder pattern is idiomatic; optional fields default to None with correct serde skip annotations. All required imports (Value, DateTime<Utc>) are present at file top.
lib.rs pub use updated to re-export SubjectRef and WorkflowArtifact with no breaking changes to existing exports.
